calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds From Proceeds By Claimant Tammy Matthews Filed On 10/6/16
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah R. Bronner (310-572-1286) for Claimant Calvin Williams via CourtCall.
Lena Wassilian (818-536-7416) for Claimant Tammy Matthews via CourtCall.
No other appearances.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Argued re: competent evidence. Claimant's counsel, Lena Wassilian submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds From Proceeds By Claimant Tammy Matthews Filed On 10/6/16 is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds From Proceeds By Claimant State Of California Franchise Tax Board
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah R. Bronner (310-572-1286) for Claimant Calvin Williams via CourtCall.
Lena Wassilian (818-536-7416) for Claimant Tammy Matthews via CourtCall.
No other appearances.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds From Proceeds By Claimant State Of California Franchise Tax Board is GRANTED. This claimant is entitled to $4,779.37 (accounting for interest through March 3, 2017) as claimed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah R. Bronner (310-572-1286) for Claimant Calvin Williams via CourtCall.
Lena Wassilian (818-536-7416) for Claimant Tammy Matthews via CourtCall.

Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

For Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah R. Bronner (310-572-1286) for Claimant Calvin Williams via CourtCall.
Lena Wassilian (818-536-7416) for Claimant Tammy Matthews via CourtCall.
No other appearances.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Not argued. Claimant's counsel, Deborah Bronner submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds From Proceeds (Calvin Williams) is GRANTED. This claimant is entitled to $88,111.57. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Hearing On Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah Bronner, Esq. (310-572-1286) for Defendant/opposing party Calivn Lane Williams through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

Defendant seeks clarification re:hearing date. The Court advises Counsel to call the clerks. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Surplus Funds From Proceeds is OFF CALENDAR, the motion to deposited surplus funds heard and granted on November 2, 2016. Funds deposited on January 6, 2017. The clerk of the Court shall calendar claims for surplus funds and serve notice of hearing. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITIONER CAL-WESTERN RECONVEYANCE RE 95 GARNETT TERRACE'S Motion On [Proposed] Order To Deposit Surplus Funds, Discharging Petitioner Of Further Responsibility For Disbursing Of Funds; And Excusing Petitioner From Further Hearings Or Participation will be heard in Department 501 on the same date at the same time. MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Cal-Western Reconveyance's Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds, Discharging Petitioner Of Further Responsibility For Disbursing Of Funds; And Excusing Petitioner From Further Hearings Or Participation is GRANTED. $249,811.94 to be deposited with the Court forthwith. Notice Of Claim To Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT CALVIN WILLIAMS' Claim To Surplus Funds is OFF CALENDAR. No funds have been deposited with the Court. Motion to Deposit Surplus Funds is calendared for November 2, 2016. Hearing on the claims to the surplus funds will be noticed by the clerk of the Court upon receipt of the funds. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

*Counsel for Defendant Michael Satourian for Petitoner Cal-Western Reconveyance appeared through Court Call during check in. Staff attorney informed him of tentative ruling, counsel did not contest and did not appear for the hearing.*
